name: Workflow Automation
description: Designs, configures, and runs trigger-based multi-step automation pipelines that connect external services, schedule jobs, and orchestrate tool sequences without continuous human supervision.

evidence.notes: n8n -- fair-code workflow automation with 400+ integrations and native AI capabilities; 90k+ stars, Apache-2 + EE license.
Activepieces -- AI agents and workflow automation with 400 MCP servers; MIT license, active community.
Flowise -- visual AI agent and workflow builder; 40k+ stars, Apache-2 license, reproducible demos.
